name: xmss_node(SK.seed, i, z, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 9

inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: i
inputs.description: Index of the target node within its height level, i < 2^(h' - z)

inputs.name: z
inputs.description: Height of the target node within the XMSS tree, z ≤ h'

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure with layer and tree addresses set to the target XMSS tree

outputs.name: node
outputs.description: n-byte root of the Merkle subtree rooted at node (i, z)

body_raw: lnode ← xmss_node(SK.seed, 2 * i, z - 1, PK.seed, ADRS)
rnode ← xmss_node(SK.seed, 2 * i + 1, z - 1, PK.seed, ADRS)
